hypothesis: O4-STABLEFLOW — Stablecoin supply growth as a lagged dry-powder flow
metric_source: DefiLlama total stablecoin circulating supply (free, no key) — output/edgehunt-D5/stablecoins_total.json
data_window: tradable 2019-01-01 .. 2026-05-30 (2018 backfill artifacts excluded; supply forward-filled, winsorized 5 MAD)
construction: smoothed log-growth of total stablecoin supply over gw days, LAGGED >=1d; dry-powder = high growth -> long. orth=1 family removes coincident-demand by expanding-causal regression on trailing 30d BTC return (reverse-causality control).
binding_gate_at_honest_N: deflated_sharpe (DSR p=0.559 @N=270; also PBO=0.60, Harvey-Liu adjP=0.35)

reverse_causality_clean_version_familyB.note: the economically honest (price-echo-removed) version DIES out-of-sample and fails the reverse-causality null

lead_lag_causality.interpretation: supply-growth-Z is ~16x more correlated with PAST 30d price than with next-day price -> reverse causality / price echo dominates; the apparent edge is a slow long-beta tilt on a rising asset.

why_not_survive: The N=3 'SURVIVE' for the raw family is a post-hoc carve-out of the N=270 search winner -> dishonest N. At the honest N=270 the effect fails Deflated Sharpe (p=0.559), PBO (0.60) and the Harvey-Liu haircut (adjP=0.35).

Orthogonalizing against coincident demand (the BACKLOG's KEY reverse-causality control) makes the holdout NEGATIVE (-0.276) and the reverse-causality placebo fail (p=0.060). The clean signal has no forward edge.
Lead/lag shows the signal is a price echo (trailing-30d corr 0.351 vs next-day 0.022).
